title: Sami Rollins Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Sami Rollins Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Sami Rollins
Khoury Faculty
Oakland Campus
When Sami Rollins started college, she had no idea she wanted to be a computer scientist. Now the director of computing programs in Oakland, she’s looking forward to mentoring a diverse body of students who will uncover their passions on a brand-new campus.
I think all of us are here because of our excitement about building something new, and it has been
really wonderful to see the campus community that has begun to evolve and be established here
Sami Rollins, Director of Graduate Computing Programs
Explore all Khoury Stories
